design_philosophy.core_concept: The concierge of social life in Northern Cyprus. Not a dating app, but a social discovery club.
design_philosophy.visual_style: Cinematic Dark Mode. Deep backgrounds, champagne gold accents, glassmorphism, high-quality photography.

typography.installation: Import via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400&display=swap');

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-semibold hover:bg-[#F3E5AB] shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] transition-all
buttons.outline: rounded-full border border-[#D4AF37]/50 text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 hover:border-[#D4AF37]

cards.profile: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-[#0F0F10] hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-colors group
cards.vitrin: aspect-[3/4] relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl hover:shadow-[0_10px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] transition-all duration-500

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-[#D4AF37] text-white placeholder:text-white/40 rounded-lg h-12

navigation.mobile_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 z-50 py-4 pb-6 px-6 flex justify-between items-center

layout_strategies.hero_section: Full screen height (min-h-[80vh]) with cinematic video/image background. Center aligned text with 'Glass' search container.
layout_strategies.grid_system: Use 'Bento' grid for features. Vitrin items should use a horizontal scroll on mobile and grid on desktop.
layout_strategies.profile_detail: Split layout: Left/Top is sticky gallery. Right/Bottom is scrollable details + chat action.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Use a subtle noise overlay SVG on the main background to reduce digital flatness.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Use thin, elegant strokes.
For the Vitrin (Showcase), implement a horizontal scroll snap on mobile.
The messaging interface should look like WhatsApp/Telegram but with the Golden/Dark theme.
Do not use gradients on text unless it's a very large headline.
Ensure all images have a lazy loading strategy.
Use 'Framer Motion' for simple entrance animations (fade up, slide in).
The 'Become a Partner' button should always be visible but secondary to 'Browse Partners'.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. Be bold with spacing and typography.
Dark mode is the default and only mode for this MVP.
Use z-index carefully to layer glass elements over images.
Micro-interactions on every button press (scale down slightly).
Data-testid attributes are mandatory for all interactive elements.
